MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: L. Jones.
Matter heard with case #407234.
Plaintiff: Dario Campos Villare, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the oral testimony and evidence presented, the Court awarded nothing for damages, Judgment for Defendants signed by Judge Marie-Victoire.
